note: WAN-profile sweep sidecar. Join onto metrics.jsonl on scenario + injectedDelay* + lossPct. Jitter is reproducible from the seed (shared sampler).

entries.reorderNote: Reorder emerges from jitter only; APPROXIMATE — Colyseus is a reliable ordered channel (real web transport suppresses reorder via HOL blocking).
